plugins.name: image-processing-and-computer-vision
plugins.description: Image processing and computer vision skills for AI coding agents. Image Processing Toolbox, Computer Vision Toolbox, Lidar Toolbox, and Mapping Toolbox.

plugins.name: matlab-app-building
plugins.description: MATLAB app building skills for AI coding agents. App Designer, uifigure, uigridlayout, UI components, callbacks, and uihtml for web integration.

plugins.name: matlab-core
plugins.description: Foundational MATLAB skills for AI coding agents. Debugging, testing, code review, and Live Script creation. Every toolkit user needs these skills, and other plugins can assume they are available.

plugins.name: matlab-software-development
plugins.description: MATLAB software development skills for AI coding agents. Source control, build tools, packaging, code modernization, and development workflows.

plugins.name: reporting-and-database-access
plugins.description: Reporting and database access skills for AI coding agents. Database Toolbox and MATLAB Report Generator.

plugins.name: rf-and-mixed-signal
plugins.description: RF and mixed-signal skills for AI coding agents. RF Toolbox and Mixed-Signal Blockset.

plugins.name: signal-processing
plugins.description: Signal processing skills for AI coding agents. Signal Processing Toolbox, DSP System Toolbox, Audio Toolbox, and Wavelet Toolbox.

plugins.name: toolkit
plugins.description: Setup and management for the MATLAB Agentic Toolkit. Detects MATLAB, installs the MCP server, registers with your AI coding agent, and verifies the environment.

plugins.name: wireless-communications
plugins.description: Wireless communications skills for AI coding agents. Communications Toolbox, 5G Toolbox, LTE Toolbox, WLAN Toolbox, Antenna Toolbox, and Satellite Communications Toolbox.
